responsibilities: Design and develop mechanical components and assemblies from concept through production using 3D CAD modeling tools
Create detailed engineering drawings with GD&T callouts to communicate manufacturing and inspection requirements clearly
Conduct tolerance stack-up analyses to ensure proper fit, form, and function across complex mechanical assemblies
Collaborate with manufacturing and supply chain teams to optimize designs for cost-effective production and assembly
Lead design reviews with cross-functional stakeholders to validate engineering decisions against product requirements
Select appropriate materials and manufacturing processes based on mechanical, thermal, and cost constraints
Build and test functional prototypes to validate design intent prior to tooling and mass production
Manage engineering change orders and maintain accurate documentation within the PDM system
Troubleshoot field and production issues by performing root cause analysis and implementing corrective design changes
